name: Anaerobic digestion medium with 14.6% (v/v) ethanol as main carbon source (PMC6373973)
description: Anaerobic digestion medium with 14.6% (v/v) ethanol as main carbon source — medium reported in PMC6373973 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC6373973 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: auto-extracted; O2/carbon verified from paper, full recipe cited from an external reference (manual review)
provenance.verification_note: Could NOT access full medium composition. The accessible article text confirms only ethanol (14.6% v/v) as the main carbon source of an anaerobic-digestion (biogas reactor) enrichment culture; salts, nitrogen source, buffer, vitamins, and trace elements are relegated to supplementary S6 Text (and reference [31]) and were not retrievable. Oxygen = anaerobic is supported by the anaerobic-digestion/b
